utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. All 5 categories appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if they are fully specified with all required details. The format requires each of the first four categories to include the type of insurance and costs. In the plan: health_coverage includes a description and monthly_cost (specified); property_coverage includes a description and monthly_cost (specified); travel_coverage includes a description and monthly_cost (specified); additional_services includes a description and monthly_cost (specified). The total_budget requires a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides new_total_monthly_cost, previous_total_monthly_cost, and total_monthly_savings (monthly), but no annual breakdown. Since the requirement explicitly asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown, the annual component is missing, so total_budget is not fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three items with identifiable names that match entries in the ground-truth ratings: EliteCare Premium Plan (as part of health_coverage description), EliteHome Premium Coverage (property_coverage), and EliteTravel Premium Plan (travel_coverage). The additional_services item is a generic description without a corresponding ground-truth item, so it is not mapped. Therefore, we map each of the three identifiable plans to their exact ratings from the ground-truth.
